title: California Recreational Fisheries Survey (CRFS)
steward: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

access.reason: CDFW directs public users to RecFIN for CRFS sample data and estimates from 2004 onward; exports depend on the query selected in the interactive warehouse.
instructions: Record whether the export contains sample data or expanded estimates, the query filters, survey mode, area, species, time range, and retrieval date.
Retain effort, weights, strata, and uncertainty fields supplied by the export.
Do not treat aggregate area labels or centroids as exact fishing locations.
Store the raw export unchanged and provide an explicit canonical-to-source column map.
access.ingestion_command: python -m pipeline.contourcast.cli ingest-observations --input CRFS_EXPORT.csv --output DATA/crfs.csv --source-id cdfw_crfs --column-map column_map.json --expected-sha256 SHA256

citation: California Department of Fish and Wildlife, California Recreational Fisheries Survey; data accessed through RecFIN. Include query and access date.
limitations: CRFS is a probability survey designed for catch and effort estimation, not a census of all trips.
Sample records and expanded estimates have different statistical meanings and must not be pooled without design-aware treatment.
Public spatial fields may be aggregated or withheld.
Survey modes, coverage, regulations, and sampling intensity vary over time.
